cases.question: What sits at the hub of the DAMA wheel?
cases.note: Core fact from the DAMA pillar overview slides (data governance at the hub).

cases.question: Is AI an official DAMA data management pillar yet?
cases.note: Tests that slide alt-text content is retrievable.

cases.question: How do you stop an AI model from hallucinating a join when querying data?
cases.note: Knowledge-graph / semantic layer point from the agentic tooling post.

cases.question: Why use Data-as-a-Service endpoints for a customer-facing banking agent?
What are the DAMA knowledge areas?
cases.note: Hybrid keyword case — the exact acronym 'DAMA' is a token sparse/BM25 retrieval nails even when dense embeddings paraphrase it away. Good before/after signal for hybrid search.

cases.question: Which Beam trigger fires on a fixed processing-time interval?
cases.note: Keyword case — answer is the exact symbol 'AfterProcessingTime'. Dense embeddings treat trigger names as near-identical; sparse disambiguates on the literal token.

cases.question: What is Model Armor used for in the banking agent build?
cases.note: Keyword case — 'Model Armor' is a GCP product name embeddings don't recognize as a unit; sparse matches the exact phrase.

cases.question: Why are CRDs and operators a reason to choose Kubernetes over Cloud Run?
cases.note: Keyword case — 'CRD' is an acronym embeddings dilute among generic Kubernetes terms; sparse pins it.

cases.question: What does save_main_session do in a Dataflow Flex Template?
cases.note: Keyword case — 'save_main_session' is a code symbol, ideal for sparse. Uses the CURRENT slug, so it fails until the ingest slug-refresh fix is deployed and posts are re-ingested.

cases.question: What is the best recipe for homemade pizza dough?
cases.note: Negative case — off-topic. Retrieval should NOT surface a strongly-relevant chunk; /ask should be out of scope.
